# @faucet/driver-nimiq-wasm

CurrencyDriver for Nimiq using the Nimiq Web Client (WASM) in-process. No external Nimiq node needed.

Config:
- `network`: "main" | "test"
- `privateKey`: seed phrase or hex; server is expected to pass this already decrypted.
- `seedPeers` (optional): override default seed peers.

Implements `parseAddress` (enforces `NQxx XXXX XXXX ...` format). Other methods require `init()` first.

Use this driver when you want a single container with no external dependencies. For separation of concerns or existing Nimiq infrastructure, use `@faucet/driver-nimiq-rpc`.
